verdict_reasoning: LYN is a Src-family non-receptor tyrosine kinase with N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. These lipid modifications anchor it to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane and intracellular membranes. LYN lacks a transmembrane domain and does not present an extracellular domain; its catalytic and regulatory domains remain cytoplasmic. It is not co-trafficked as a stable complex partner of an outer-leaflet protein. Extracellular binders cannot access LYN from the outside.
